reasoning: The control SC-8(1) focuses on ensuring transmission confidentiality and integrity through cryptographic protection. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring secure communication channels through the use of TLS for network policies, ingress controllers, service mesh, and etcd. These components can enforce cryptographic protocols to protect data in transit, aligning with the control's requirements.
title: Transmission Confidentiality And Integrity - Transmission confidentiality and integrity | cryptographic protection implement
